selection.method: Pinned the verified nixos-26.05 branch head at workspace replay time.
rationale: The checked-in Bun/shared and Dotnet family locks disagreed, so no existing family lock was authoritative.
Selecting the current release-branch head keeps the new replay current while creating one immutable direct nixpkgs identity for every descendant.
All later diene branches must copy this revision exactly; family-local lock history is evidence only.

observedDisagreement.note: The input was also misnamed nixpkgs-2511.

selection.s2: The atomipkgs/nix-registry v3 nested nixpkgs pin remains registry-owned and deferred under S2; direct diene inputs use this file's revision now.
